name: New Maharaja
note: Savor authentic Indian cuisine at New Maharaja Indian Cuisine and Bar in Chippewa Falls, WI, serving lunch and dinner with dishes like Chicken Tikka Masala, Lamb Vindaloo, and Vegetable Samosas. Customers love our vibrant flavors and warm hospitality. Order delivery or takeout for a tasty meal in Chippewa Falls, Eau Claire, or Altoona neighborhoods!

name: Chubbys
note: Take out only – bahn mi sliders, birria taco egg roll.

name: Thai Orchid
note: Medium good thai food. People are super nice. We usually get take out and go to a park to eat it. Usually too much food but it’s better than average

name: Helix Wine, Craft Bar & Cafe
note: only open on the Weekends for lunch

name: Juantias
note: Good Mexican food – plentiful and flavorful. People were really nice.

name: Cajun Red’s
note: All sites seem to indicate this restaurant may no longer exist?

name: Bridge St Brew
note: Excellent sandwich shop in downtown Chippewa Falls

name: Beast + Bonito
note: BEST – absolute best Japanese ramen. I really love this place.

name: Xavier Artisan Bistro
note: Really interesting cafe with excellent sandwiches. A Turkish influence. Fresh and interesting.

name: Tokyo
note: Best shrimp tempura bento box. There are several of these japanese restaurants in our area each with the name of a japanese city… but this one has the best bento box.

name: Egg Rolls and More
note: We went once and have not given up, but things were not the best…

name: 7 Brothers Bar and Grill
note: Current BEST BURGER on our list.

name: Nichol Inn
note: Good fish fry. Good burgers. Really nice spot

name: Lucette Brewery
note: BEST PIZZA and beer! Our favorite place in Menomonie – but only Fri-Sun for lunch.
